summary: Superb matrix recording of a very good show – highly recommended.
review: The composite (matrix) source created by Hunter delivers a clear and balanced sound that showcases the performance nicely. Reviewers describe the concert as "very good" and urge listeners to give it a spin, though no specific songs or moments are called out.

ai_rating.rationale: Only one five‑star review; it praises both the matrix recording and the overall show, indicating a high quality performance and excellent technical capture.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Composite (matrix) mix described as beautiful and highly recommended; no reported issues with clarity or balance.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Reviewer calls the show "very good" but provides no detailed comments on set structure or specific moments.
